Interface DocumentRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Document,Long>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Document,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Document,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Document,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Document,Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Document>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Document,Long>
@Repository public interface DocumentRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Document,Long>

  • Method Details

    • findById

      @EntityGraph(attributePaths="documentGroup") Optional<Document> findById(Long id)
      Specified by:
      findById in interface org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Document,Long>

    • findByDocumentInfo_DocumentGroup_Id

      List<Document> findByDocumentInfo_DocumentGroup_Id(int documentGroupId)

    • findLatestVersionByName

      @Query("SELECT d FROM Document d WHERE d.name = :name AND d.documentInfo.documentGroup.id = :groupId ORDER BY d.version DESC") List<Document> findLatestVersionByName(@Param("name") String name, @Param("groupId") int groupId)

    • findByFilter

      @Query("SELECT d FROM Document d WHERE (:name IS NULL OR d.name = :name) AND (:tag IS NULL OR d.tag = :tag) AND (:version IS NULL OR d.version = :version)") Collection<Document> findByFilter(@Param("name") String name, @Param("tag") String tag, @Param("version") Integer version)
